message:
test(lifecycle): capabilities features/connectors uniqueness + limits sanity (ibuuh.23)

Registry-invariant row. cass capabilities --json enumerates the feature
set and connector set as string arrays plus a limits block of four
integer fields. This row asserts three invariants:

 1. capabilities.features contains no duplicate entries (each feature
    registered exactly once; catches accidental double-registration
    during refactor).
 2. capabilities.connectors contains no duplicate entries (same class
    of bug — a connector registered in two modules would silently
    skew downstream dedup).
 3. limits.{max_limit, max_content_length, max_fields, max_agg_buckets}
    are all non-negative integers (catches type-drift or sign-flip).

Also sanity-asserts both lists are non-empty so the invariant can't
degenerate into a tautological no-op if the extraction path breaks.

VERIFICATION:
cargo test --test lifecycle_matrix: 68/68 pass.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.23.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
